edges.ev: PtrMYB3 and PtrMYB20 were demonstrated to be direct targets of PtrWNDs
direct targets of PtrWNDs and functional orthologs of the Arabidopsis MYB46
expression of PtrMYB2 and PtrMYB21 is induced by PtrWNDs
PtrWND2B-regulated transcription factors including PtrNAC156
PtrNAC157 were able to activate the promoter activities
KNAT7 homolog (PtrKNAT7) induced by PtrWND2B
PtrMYB3 activates biosynthetic genes for all three major wood components
PtrMYB3 able to activate lignin biosynthetic genes COMT2
PtrMYB20 functional ortholog of MYB46 activates lignin biosynthetic genes
PtrMYB21 overexpressors show activation of cellulose, xylan and lignin (4CL1 and CCoAOMT1)
PtrMYB21 overexpressors show lignin (4CL1 and CCoAOMT1) activation
transgenic lines had increased expression of several lignin biosynthetic genes including 4CL1
increased expression of biosynthetic genes including HCT
increased expression of biosynthetic genes including C3H1
increased expression of biosynthetic genes including CCoAOMT1
increased expression of biosynthetic genes including CAD6
S/G monomer ratio was higher in the transgenic plants than wild-type (0.37-0.42 vs 0.31)
CCR2 activated by PtrMYB152
F5H activated by PtrMYB152 and PtrMYB090/161
5' RACE validated cleavage of PtrLAC1 by ptr-miR397a
12 laccase genes directly regulated by ptr-miR397a
expression of 17 of 34 SDX-expressed laccase genes was down-regulated by 32-86%; lignin content reduced 12-22%
S/G ratio of 2.2 compared with 2.1 in WT (not significant)
transcript of CCoAOMT1 was induced by overexpressing WND3A; direct target of PtrWND6B
PtrMYB3 activates biosynthesis pathways including PAL genes
PtrMYB3 and PtrMYB20 activate biosynthesis pathways of lignin including PAL
expression of PAL4 was induced in transgenic plants overexpressing PtoMYB216
C4H2 is directly activated by PtoMYB216 through AC elements
4CL5 could be activated by PtoMYB216
expression of C3H3 was also activated by PtoMYB216
CCR2 were activated by PtoMYB216
CAD were activated by PtoMYB216
COMT2 is activated by PtoMYB170, PtrMYB090 and PtrMYB152
PtoMYB156 overexpression resulted in downregulation of PtoPAL1
PtrMYB090, PtrMYB161 identified as upstream regulators of F5H genes
PtrMYB090 PtrMYB161 identified as upstream regulators of F5H genes
COMT2 is activated by PtoMYB170, PtrMYB090 and PtrMYB152
expression of PtrCAD1 was repressed by PtrMYB174
PtrWRKY19 can repress the expression of PtoC4H2
HCT1 regulated by PtrWBLH2
CSE directly regulated by PtrWBLH1
PtrWBLH2 identified as upstream regulator of F5H genes
miRNA166 targets HD-ZIP III TFs to regulate C4H, CAD, CCoAOMT
PtrSND1-A2 intron retention splice variant acts as negative regulator for reciprocal cross-regulation

perturbations.ev: Overexpression of PtrWND2 and PtrWND6 in Arabidopsis leads to activation of secondary wall biosynthetic genes and ectopic deposition of secondary walls
Dominant repression of PtrWND2B reduced wall thickness of xylary fibers by 56%
Dominant repression of PtrWND6B reduced wall thickness by 68%
thickness of secondary walls in wood fibers in PtrMYB3 and PtrMYB21 repressors was reduced by 60 to 70%
strong alterations in wall thickness and vessel morphology in wood of stems
24% and 18% increase in lignin for 35S:PtrMYB152 and PtrCesA8:PtrMYB152; S/G 0.37-0.42 vs 0.31
Overexpression of Ptr-MIR397a reduced Klason lignin content 12-22%; S/G slightly increased to 2.2 vs 2.1 WT (not significant)
